75684.subject: рЯСС Grok is dethroning Opus and GPT
75684.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Musk dropped Grok 4.5, Opus-class coding at a fraction of the price, free for now. ChatGPT's new voice talks like a person instead of a walkie-talkie. Google Omni will restyle your videos for a fee, and Anthropic is about to post AI's first real profit, right as Musk aims at it.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Grok:** Can a $2 model really do Opus-level work?

* **ChatGPT:** What makes the new voice feel human?

* **Google:** What's the new button in Google Photos?

* **Anthropic:** Who's actually making money in AI?


----------



----------
## [Grok 4.5 launches at a quarter of Claude's price](https://x.ai/news/grok-4-5)





View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f5918d40-ff98-42a3-a912-cef6097d0c13/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_9.png?t=1783588942)
Caption: 





Must bought Cursor and dropped Grok 4.5, and the benchmarks are making OpenAI and Anthropic shake in their boots.

ItвАЩs already and Opus level model but costs way less.

$2 in, $6 out per million tokens. Opus 4.8 charges $5 and $25.

It's the first Grok built for coding and agents, trained with Cursor on trillions of tokens of real developer sessions. 

Must doesnвАЩt want to overhype it tho. He admitted on X that itвАЩs not close to Fable yet, but said you donвАЩt need a Fable level model for most tasks.

Grok's pitch is the bill. It runs at 80 tokens a second and finishes the same task on a quarter of the tokens Opus burns.

Musk calls it "roughly comparable to Opus 4.7, but much faster," and says the follow-up model, reportedly 2 trillion parameters, lands next month. If this one is already at an Opus level, what happens with the next one? WeвАЩre excited. 

The new Grok is free for now in Cursor and Grok Build. The EU waits till mid-July.


----------















----------
## [The AI Boom has a bottleneck but the solution is right in front of you](https://utm.genai.works/r/okzhvfg)





View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/09618ac1-6b88-429a-8a0a-12cb201707e2/Screenshot_2026-07-09_at_10.51.16_AM.png?t=1783589006)
Caption: 





Every AI company fights the same battle. The market never sees most of them.

For years, we built the system behind the scenes and successfully ran go-to-market for NVIDIA, Oracle, Google and 300+ AI brands, powered by data from a 14M+ community competitors can't reach. 

This helped us 2.5x our revenue last year, and now you

75682.subject: Claude Managed Agents Quietly Became the Most Important AI Infrastructure Bet of 2026 рЯ§Ц
75682.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/claude-managed-agents-update

рЯСЛ Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 395k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
In April, I published The Ultimate Guide to Claude Managed Agents рЯ§Ц [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4bda355-f08e-44a9-b769-21438cb2464c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], the most thorough breakdown of AnthropicвАЩs new managed agent runtime available anywhere. 
Thousands of you read it. That was Day Zero.
As IвАЩm writing this on July 9, 2026, most of what people вАЬknowвАЭ about Claude Managed Agents is now out of date, including parts of my own guide.
In the three months since launch, this product has changed more than most software changes in a year.
вЖТ The research-preview shelf has nearly emptied: Memory, Multi-agent coordination, and Outcomes all quietly shipped to public beta.
вЖТ Anthropic added scheduled deployments, which turn a Claude agent from a tool you call into an autonomous worker that runs itself on a cron schedule, pulls its own credentials, and reports back while you sleep.
вЖТ AWS and Google looked at the architecture and shipped near-identical managed harnesses two weeks after launch, both on the same day.
вЖТ And the first real production economics finally surfaced, including one company that 3xвАЩd to $10M in annualized revenue on Anthropic's agent stack.
ThatвАЩs why I went back and fact-checked every headline number from the launch coverage against primary sources: the pricing pages, the engineering posts, the customer stories, the support docs. Some of the most-quoted metrics about Claude Managed Agents do not hold up the way people repeat them. One famous customer stat is actually two different stories stitched together. Another widely cited figure isnвАЩt a per-task cost at all.
If youвАЩre about to bet a roadmap, a build decision, or an investment thesis on this, you are almost certainly working from at least one number thatвАЩs wrong.
This is the follow-up to the original guide [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4bda355-f08e-44a9-b769-21438cb2464c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. It tells you what actually shipped, which numbers are real, what the competition did, and exactly what it means if youвАЩre a founder, a builder, or an investor deciding whether to commit to this stack right now.
Everything below is the part most people will get wrong.
The Research-Preview Shelf Emptied Out, Fast...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdNalF6TnpBM09Dd2lhV0YwSWpveE56Z3pOVGc1TkRVekxDSmxlSEFpT2pFNE1UVXhNalUwTlRNc0ltbHpjeUk2SW5CMVlpMDRNVGd4T1NJc0luTjFZaUk2SW1ScGMyRmliR1ZmWlcxaGFXd2lmUS4xSmFEOC1HWGdiTmV5QWVnQ

75674.subject: Scheduled maintenance today, 9 July
75674.body:
Exchange and local card top-ups temporarily temporarily
unavailable today.  wirex logo

***********************************
Scheduled maintenance today, 9 July

***********************************

Dear Oleh,

As communicated yesterday, this is a reminder that exchange
operations and local card top-ups will be temporarily unavailable
today due to scheduled maintenance by our third-party provider.

Date and time: today, 9 July 2026, from 07:00 UTC (expected to
be completed within a few hours).

Affected operations:

* Exchange
* Local card top-up
All operations will resume automatically once the maintenance
window is complete. No action is required on your part.
